positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description:
Promoted from Data Analyst Intern to full-time Data Analyst after demonstrating strong performance in forecasting, reporting automation, and operational analytics.
Partnered with supply chain and operations teams to develop forecasting models that reduced stockouts by 18% and saved $20,000 in warehousing costs.
Queried and analyzed sales data across 60+ pharmaceutical product lines using SQL to improve forecasting accuracy by 12% and identify underperforming business segments.
Designed executive-facing Power BI KPI dashboards with drill-through reporting capabilities, replacing manual spreadsheets and improving performance visibility across 10+ sales regions while saving 15+ hours monthly.
Automated Python-based validation workflows across 20+ recurring reports, reducing reporting inaccuracies by 15% and freeing 6+ analyst hours weekly for higher-value analysis.
Standardized and validated reporting data across 60+ pharmaceutical product lines, reducing downstream reporting errors by 22%.
achievements: Promoted from Data Analyst Intern to full-time Data Analyst after demonstrating strong performance in forecasting, reporting automation, and operational analytics.

positions.company: Butterfly Pea Flower Herbal Tea Business
positions.title: Co-Founder — D2C Herbal Tea Brand
positions.description:
Analyzed acquisition, retention, and sales performance trends that contributed to scaling the business to $70K in revenue with 32% quarter-over-quarter growth.
Built Power BI dashboards integrating Shopify sales and customer data to monitor KPI performance, revenue trends, and inventory movement for business planning and investor presentations.
Identified repeat-purchase gaps through customer behavior analysis and implemented automated WhatsApp engagement workflows that increased repeat sales by 40% while reducing COD and RTO losses.
Evaluated product, channel, and customer retention trends to guide inventory planning, marketing allocation, and repeat-purchase strategy decisions.
achievements: Analyzed acquisition, retention, and sales performance trends that contributed to scaling the business to $70K in revenue with 32% quarter-over-quarter growth.
Built Power BI dashboards integrating Shopify sales and customer data to monitor KPI performance, revenue trends, and inventory movement for business planning and investor presentations.
Identified repeat-purchase gaps through customer behavior analysis and implemented automated WhatsApp engagement workflows that increased repeat sales by 40% while reducing COD and RTO losses.
Evaluated product, channel, and customer retention trends to guide inventory planning, marketing allocation, and repeat-purchase strategy decisions.
